---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for gh-runs
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**What problem does this solve?**
The situation you hit and why the current behaviour falls short.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen. If it touches the command line, sketch the invocation and flags. If it touches the TUI, describe the keys and what the screen shows.

**Have you checked the docs?**
v2 is designed in the open, so the answer may already be written down or already ruled out.

- [docs/PRD.md](https://github.com/jv-k/gh-runs/blob/main/docs/PRD.md) is the product definition
- [docs/features/](https://github.com/jv-k/gh-runs/tree/main/docs/features) lists the requirements, each with its own Open questions
- [docs/adr/](https://github.com/jv-k/gh-runs/tree/main/docs/adr) records decisions already made, and the reasoning behind them

Link anything related that you found.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Other approaches, including doing this with plain `gh` or a shell pipeline.

**Additional context**
Anything else worth knowing.
